active_goal: Productize the remaining frontend module scope as one large DEV-024 task and keep it within one final PR.
last_summary: DEV-024 converted the current frontend from development-verification copy into a production-facing collaboration platform shell. Dashboard now shows business workbench panels, project health, contract/approval status, organization scope and system notifications. Settings now presents organization/account, role/data, approval/file, audit/runtime and AI governance modules. User-facing DEV/seed-dev/debug copy was removed, app-copy regression test was added, and Browser verified login plus dashboard/workbench/projects/tasks/chat/knowledge/contracts/approvals/settings with forbiddenCopyPresent=false. Browser screenshot capture timed out, so DOM evidence was saved at docs/dev-log/DEV-024-browser-evidence.json.

browser_verification.result: login and 9 modules opened; forbiddenCopyPresent=false for every module; screenshot capture timed out and JSON evidence was saved

next_recommended_task: Push DEV-024 branch, open one PR against issue #51, and keep DEV-024 test service available for user acceptance.
